landing.functions.title: Everything you need to run the business

landing.feature.routines.title: Workout builder

landing.whitelabel.title: Your brand. Your URL.
landing.whitelabel.subtitle: Every coach gets branded space: clients land on your link and see your identity—not a generic vendor.

landing.whitelabel.customize.body: Set primary color, logo, and welcome messaging. Clients use a dedicated path under your slug.

landing.journey.title: From onboarding to weekly follow-up
landing.journey.subtitle: How coach tools connect to the client experience.
landing.journey.c1.title: Dashboard
landing.journey.c1.b1: Business snapshot: recurring revenue, logged sessions, and client growth.
landing.journey.c1.b2: Quickly see who needs attention today.
landing.journey.c1.b3: Metrics tailored to online and hybrid coaching.
landing.journey.c2.title: Clients & profiles
landing.journey.c2.b1: Directory with activity signals and full profile access.
landing.journey.c2.b2: Goals, injuries, notes, and weight history in one profile.
landing.journey.c2.b3: Assign programs and nutrition plans according to your subscription tier.

landing.journey.c3.b1: Session builder with a GIF-backed exercise catalog.
landing.journey.c3.b2: Reusable program library so you never start from scratch.

landing.journey.c4.title: Nutrition
landing.journey.c4.b1: Available from Pro: per-client plans and templates.
landing.journey.c4.b2: Clients log meals; you see adherence next to training data.
landing.journey.c4.b3: Starter tiers focus on training; nutrition unlocks as you scale.

landing.journey.c5.b2: Fewer scattered chats—everything lives on the profile.

landing.journey.c6.b1: Customize logo, color, and welcome copy.
landing.journey.c6.b2: Dedicated URL so clients always know where to go.
landing.journey.c6.b3: Installable PWA: app-like delivery without store submissions.
landing.pricing.title: Plans by client seats
landing.pricing.subtitle: Prices in CLP. Entry tiers bill monthly; Elite and Scale bill quarterly or annually with prepay discounts. Nutrition is included from Pro upward.
landing.pricing.enterprise: Need 100+ clients or custom integrations? Email us for enterprise options.
landing.pricing.plan.starter_lite.desc: Accessible entry to run a small client roster.
landing.pricing.plan.starter.desc: Great when you are active but do not need nutrition yet.
landing.pricing.plan.pro.desc: The typical sweet spot: more seats plus nutrition.
landing.pricing.plan.scale.desc: Standard platform ceiling; quarterly or annual prepay.
landing.usecases.title: What EVA handles day to day
landing.usecases.subtitle: Example workflows—outcomes still depend on your service and consistency.
landing.usecases.card1.title: Fewer spreadsheets and stray threads
landing.usecases.card1.body: Centralize programs, updates, and tracking. Clients know where the plan lives; you know where adherence is.
landing.usecases.card2.title: One template, many athletes
landing.usecases.card2.body: Reuse programs and tailor per person. Save time every time you onboard someone new.
landing.usecases.card3.title: Professional delivery on day one
landing.usecases.card3.body: Own URL and branding signal continuity beyond the gym floor.
landing.contact.title: Contact
landing.contact.subtitle: Billing in Chile and product support—we reply by email.
landing.final.subtitle: Pick a plan by seats—you can change as you grow.
tooltip.sets: Number of sets (rounds) to complete for this exercise. Each set is a fixed number of repetitions.
tooltip.reps: How many times to repeat the movement per set. If you see a range (e.g. 8–12), try to stay within it.
tooltip.weight: Target weight in kilograms suggested by your coach. Use it as a guide or base it on what you lifted last session.
tooltip.rir: RIR (Reps In Reserve): how many extra reps you feel you could do before failure. E.g. RIR 2 means stopping when you could still do 2 more. RPE: rated perceived exertion from 1–10, where 1 is full rest, 7–8 is hard but controlled, and 10 is maximum effort (failure).
tooltip.tempo: Movement rhythm (eccentric – bottom pause – concentric – top pause). E.g. 3-1-X-1 means 3s down, 1s pause, eXplosive up, 1s pause at the top.
tooltip.rest: Rest time between sets. Keeping it consistent helps recovery and performance.
tooltip.notes: Extra cues from your coach: posture, focus, or technique details that matter for this exercise.
section.workoutHero: Your assigned workout for today. Tap the card to start and log your sets one by one.
section.workoutExecution: Enter the weight and reps for each set and press ✓ to save. You can change the values at any time and press ✓ again to update.
section.checkIn: Your monthly progress snapshot: bodyweight, front and back photos, and optional notes. Your coach will see it in your profile to track your evolution.
section.nutrition: Your meal plan for today. Tap each meal to mark it complete and track your macros. The ring shows how much of your daily goal you've reached.
section.exercises: Full exercise catalog. Tap any exercise to view technique, instructions, and execution video.
section.compliance: Your 30-day adherence: what percentage of workouts and meals you completed vs. your target.
section.coachDashboard: Business overview: monthly recurring revenue (MRR), sessions logged by your clients in the last 30 days, and client growth over 6 months.
section.coachClients: Directory of all your clients. The attention score flags who needs the most attention based on recent activity. Tap a client to view their full profile.
section.coachBuilder: Weekly/cycle program builder. Drag exercises from the catalog and configure sets, reps, target weight, tempo, rest time, and notes per block.
section.coachPrograms: Reusable program library. Build a program once and assign it to multiple clients with their own variants.
section.coachNutrition: Nutrition plan management. Define macro targets, meals, and foods for each client or create reusable templates.
section.coachBrand: Customize how clients see your app: logo, primary color, and welcome message. Your clients see your brand, not EVA's.
